name: ruby-async-io
title: ruby-async-io
summary: Provides support for asynchronous TCP, UDP, UNIX and SSL sockets
description:
Provides support for asynchronous TCP, UDP, UNIX and SSL sockets
Async::IO provides builds on async and provides asynchronous wrappers for
IO, Socket, and related classes.
